title: Conditional Logic Coding
description: Coding challenges using if/elif/else with multiple conditions and edge-case handling.
subject: Programming

content.prompt: Write a program that classifies people into age categories: Child (0-12), Teenager (13-19), Adult (20-64), Senior (65+). Handle negative ages as errors.
content.starterCode:
age = int(input("Enter your age: "))

# TODO: Add conditional logic to classify age
# Categories:
# - Negative ages: "Error: Age cannot be negative!"
# - 0-12: "You are a Child!"
# - 13-19: "You are a Teenager!"
# - 20-64: "You are an Adult!"
# - 65+: "You are a Senior!"

print("Classification complete.")

testCases.expected:
You are a Child!
Classification complete.

You are a Teenager!
Classification complete.

You are an Adult!
Classification complete.

You are a Senior!
Classification complete.

Error: Age cannot be negative!
Classification complete.

content.prompt: Create a grade calculator that assigns letter grades and provides feedback. Handle invalid scores (negative or over 100).
content.starterCode:
score = int(input("Enter your test score: "))

# TODO: Implement grade calculation
# Grade Scale:
# - Invalid (< 0 or > 100): "Invalid score! Must be 0-100."
# - 90-100: "Grade: A" and "Excellent work!"
# - 80-89: "Grade: B" and "Good job!"
# - 70-79: "Grade: C" and "You passed!"
# - 60-69: "Grade: D" and "You need improvement."
# - 0-59: "Grade: F" and "Please study harder."

print("Grade calculation complete.")

testCases.expected:
Grade: A
Excellent work!
Grade calculation complete.

Grade: B
Good job!
Grade calculation complete.

Grade: C
You passed!
Grade calculation complete.

Grade: D
You need improvement.
Grade calculation complete.

Grade: F
Please study harder.
Grade calculation complete.

Invalid score! Must be 0-100.
